title: polygala abyssinica var. subaphylla
intro: Polygala abyssinica var. subaphylla, also known as Abyssinian polygala or small leaved polygala, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Polygala abyssinica var. subaphylla are typically made from the roots, leaves, or stems, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or extracts.
